metadata.name: Train a Retailer on a New Product Line

description: A wholesaler is launching a new, complex product line. An agent needs to schedule and conduct a training session for a key retailer's sales staff.

nodes.task_description: Contact the retailer to schedule a product training session.

expected_outcome.value: A date and time for a virtual training session is agreed upon.

nodes.task_description: Prepare training materials, including a presentation and product demos.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a comprehensive training packet.

nodes.task_description: Conduct the training session for the retailer's staff.
